accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: TokenAccount, keeper will create it in the instruction before (alternative)

errors.name: InvalidEventUpdate
errors.msg: Invalid event update - event is finalized or immutable

errors.name: DepositNotAllowedForSells
errors.msg: Deposit not allowed for sell orders

errors.name: DepositBelowMinimum
errors.msg: Deposit amount must be at least $1

errors.name: InvalidFill
errors.msg: Invalid fill data - contracts or price is zero

errors.name: PartialFillNotAllowed
errors.msg: Partial fills not allowed (FOK orders only)

fields.name: settlement_time
docs: Unix timestamp after which claims are permitted

fields.name: claims_enabled
docs: Whether claims are currently enabled for this market

fields.name: is_yes
docs: Whether this is a YES or NO position

fields.name: payout_claimed
docs: Whether payout has been claimed (only relevant after market settlement)

fields.name: payout_claimed_usd
docs: Amount claimed in USD with 6 decimals (for record keeping)

fields.name: total_cost_usd
docs: Total cost basis for all contracts (USD with 6 decimals)
This is the sum of all dollars paid for currently held contracts

fields.name: open_orders
docs: Number of open orders for this position

fields.name: realized_pnl_usd
docs: Realized PnL from closed positions (USD, can be negative)

fields.name: updated_at
docs: Timestamp when position was last updated
